subcodes.first_line: O thou renowned and celebrated Bahá'í! That crystal heart hath, praise be to God, become a niche of light and, through knowledge and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهائی معروف و مشهور آن دل بلور الحمد لله مشکوه نور گردیده و چون عرفان و
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
